title: 10 Herbal Creams For Fluid Retention
description: Urtica dioica creams contains a combination of anti-inflammatory and diuretic properties that help to alleviate fluid retention. The cream is made from the extract of the stinging nettle plant, which is rich in compounds like flavonoids, saponins, and aucubin. These constituents help to reduce swelling and inflammation in the body, making it easier to flush out excess fluid.
